since_last: 68% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.55%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 68% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -1.09% · Gold +1.38% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 68% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.55%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.55%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +5.15%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +5.15%, TER +4.45%, AMAT +4.38%, LRCX +4.32%, KLAC +4.01%. Laggards: DDOG -2.72%, HON -2.06%, BIDU -1.03%, NET -1.01%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.46% at $164.37
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.46% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
